LanguageData.AM_Budweiser.description: A once popular ancient beer brand, canned for its ancient customers.
LanguageData.AM_Budweiser.label: budweiser
LanguageData.AM_CannedBraisedPorkbelly.description: An ancient can of braised pork. Its a great source of happiness despite the dust.
LanguageData.AM_CannedBraisedPorkbelly.label: canned braised pork
LanguageData.AM_CannedHerring.description: An ancient can of herring. Quite salty, but the freshness is appealing.
LanguageData.AM_CannedHerring.label: canned herring
LanguageData.AM_CannedPeas.description: An ancient can of soft, sweet peas.
LanguageData.AM_CannedPeas.label: canned peas
LanguageData.AM_CannedStewedBeef.description: An ancient can of muffalo meat stewed with potatoes and tomatoes. Very delicious.
LanguageData.AM_CannedStewedBeef.label: canned stewed muffalo
LanguageData.AM_Coca.description: An ancient sparkling beverage with high sugar content. Just a sip could make someone happy for an entire day.
LanguageData.AM_Coca.label: coca-cola
LanguageData.AM_DeliciousCannedBeef.description: An ancient can of pure muffalo meat stew. Has a very strong buttery aroma.
LanguageData.AM_DeliciousCannedBeef.label: deluxe canned muffalo
LanguageData.AM_Fanta.description: An ancient carbonated orange-flavored soft drink, sweet and delicious.
LanguageData.AM_Fanta.label: fanta
LanguageData.AM_MilkBeer.description: An ancient concoction of milk and beer mixed with canned drinks. It can even fill the stomach!
LanguageData.AM_MilkBeer.label: milk beer
LanguageData.AM_MRE.description: A pack of ancient military rations. It's intact and won't spoil, but it doesn't look very appetizing.
LanguageData.AM_MRE.label: military ration
LanguageData.AM_Pepsi.description: An ancient, slightly inferior carbonated soft drink. Seems sweeter than the others.
LanguageData.AM_Pepsi.label: pepsi
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsA.description: An ancient bag of classic thin cut salted potato chips. and packaged with nitrogen gas making it difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsA.label: classic potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsB.description: An ancient bag of tomato flavored potato chips. It's sweet and sour, delicious, and packaged with nitrogen gas making it difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsB.label: tomato potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsC.description: An ancient bag of potato chips with a unique cucumber flavor，packaged with nitrogen gas making it difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsC.label: cucumber potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsD.description: An ancient bag of steak flavored potato chips. Eating them feels like enjoying a feast. Packaged with nitrogen gas making it difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsD.label: steak potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsE.description: An ancient bag of lemon flavored potato chips. Bursting with that summer flavor, and packaged with a nitrogen gas, making difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsE.label: lemon potato chips
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsF.description: An ancient bag of Italian braised potato chips. Its taste is like eating a strong and fragrant tomato minced meat stew. Packaged with a nitrogen gas, making difficult to spoil.
LanguageData.AM_PotatoChipsF.label: italian red stew potato chips
LanguageData.AM_Sprite.description: An ancient lemon-lime flavored soft drink with a strong sour taste.
LanguageData.AM_Sprite.label: sprite
LanguageData.AM_TsingtaoBeer.description: An ancient canned beer with a lovely aftertaste.
LanguageData.AM_TsingtaoBeer.label: tsingtao
